article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with major industry figures and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with prominent figures in the music industry. His collaborations include projects with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, among others.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This collection features a comprehensive array of his samples, loops, and drums that have been utilized across various tracks.

His approach to production is characterized by a focus on moombahton and dancehall rhythms, blending electronic elements with traditional dancehall influences. This distinctive style has earned him recognition within the Latin electronic music scene.

Noizekid's work is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
